title: The Forgotten Rise Up
description: Pages 17–21 focus on the forgotten rise up, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the country erupts after Sugar's spell breaks, the underground victims return, and Doflamingo's secret rule begins collapsing in public.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That man is the former captain of the Riku Royal Army....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: KYROS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The greatest gladiator the colos- Seum has ever known.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh!! That's the guy from the statue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The man in that statue is a legend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, he is the man from that statue.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And he is also Rebecca's father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huh?! but she said she didn't know him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: While our memories were lost, there was no way for him to tell us of his identity.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's why he spent ten long years simple watching over his beloved daughter....!!! Making sure she would not be alone...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even as a toy soldier, he spent every single day by her side....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: - Why could I not re- member .....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: AA- Hhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Forget the tour- moment, we have bigger things to worry about now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What a crazy situ- action!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Even in the Colos- Seum...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The stands are in a mad panic!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Hey, who the hell are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...but now...I can remember clearly...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Kyros, is that you?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: It is it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I must apologise for keep- ing you waiting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: ...these ten long years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I could not remember a thing.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: It's me, your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Kyros!! Me, your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: But it was you all along...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: You're ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: But now, I am here to save you!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Young Master !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: WhoAAAA!! Mingo just died!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: We've found you, intrud- ERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Let's go save Tra- dude!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Aahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: I have come to take back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...The real dress- Rosa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Run for it!! to the exits!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: There are wild beasts in the stands ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: unbe- livevable... damn it, Trebol....!!

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Did you let your eyes off sugar, you fool?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Hey!! How long you gonna keep crying?! I'm not a baby- sitter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: You don't under- stand...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I had... I had a father!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: I've just Remem- Bered!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: ...It looks like this was the secret hidden beneath the surface of this kingdom....!! Right, re- BECA?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: All things have a "core" if you dig deep enough.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're gonna start spouting weird stuff now an' all, super- Senpa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: At any rate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: First, let's finish off this match.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: This ring is no dif- ferent...it too has a "core".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: "Ryu- Souken"!!! Dragon...

summary: The Forgotten Rise Up develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
